raw_data.details: The “Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana” has been launched in 2012-13 by the Government of Himachal Pradesh in honour of the late astronaut Kalpana Chawla. The scheme has been implemented by the Education Department, Government of Himachal Pradesh. The scheme has been introduced to provide financial assistance to girl students from economically weaker sections, enabling them to pursue higher education without financial burden. It has been made applicable to eligible girl students who are permanent residents of Himachal Pradesh and are studying in recognized institutions within the state, with the objective of helping them achieve their career goals and become self-reliant.
raw_data.benefits: The scholarship provides ₹18,000 per annum, which will be directly credited to the beneficiary’s bank account.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a resident of Himachal Pradesh. The applicant must be a girl. The applicant must be a regular student of 10+2, academic, professional or technical course in Science/Arts/Commerce stream. The institution where the applicant is admitted must be a Government / Government Aided / Private School affiliated with the Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education. The scholarship is available for higher education courses, including undergraduate, postgraduate, and professional courses. The scholarship will be given strictly on 10+2 merit declared by the Himachal Pradesh Board of School Education, Dharamshala.
raw_data.application_process:
Online
Step 1: Go to [http://www.scholarships.gov.in/](http://www.scholarships.gov.in/) and click “New Registration”. Guidelines for Registration will appear. Scroll to the bottom. Read carefully the undertaking. Accept the Terms. Click “Continue”.
Step 2: A Registration Form will appear. (The fields marked as * are compulsory)Fill the details and click “Register”. Your Application ID and password will be displayed. The same will also be sent as an SMS on your registered mobile number.
Step 3: Go to https://scholarships.gov.in/fresh/newstdRegfrmInstruction Click on “Login to Apply”. Enter your Application ID and password. Type the Captcha and click “Login”. On the next screen, provide the OTP received on your registered mobile number. You will be directed to the Password Reset screen. Create a new password and confirm. Click “Submit”. You will be directed to the “Applicant’s Dashboard”.
Step 4: On the left pane, click “Application Form”. The fields marked as * are compulsory. Fill the details and upload the documents. You can either click on “Save as Draft” to complete the application later. Else, click “Final Submit” to submit the application.
raw_data.documents_required: Aadhar CardPassing Certificate of Class 12thAdmission Certificate of the Post 10+2 CourseBank PassbookSelection Letter Granted by the Educational AuthorityPassport Size PhotoDomicile Certificate of Himachal Pradesh Income CertificateFee Payment ReceiptBonafide Certificate

faqs.question: What Is Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana?
faqs.answer: The Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana is a scholarship scheme launched by the government of Himachal Pradesh to provide financial assistance to meritorious girl students belonging to economically weaker sections.

faqs.question: Can A Girl Student Apply For The Scholarship If She Is Studying In A School Outside Of Himachal Pradesh?
faqs.answer: No, only students studying in schools located in Himachal Pradesh are eligible for the scholarship.

faqs.question: How Much Financial Assistance Is Provided Under The Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana?
faqs.answer: The selected candidates are provided financial assistance of ₹15,000 per annum for their studies.

faqs.question: When Is The Last Date To Apply For The Scholarship?
faqs.answer: The last date to apply for the Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana is usually in the month of September, but it may vary every year.

faqs.question: Is There Any Application Fee To Apply For The Scholarship?
faqs.answer: No, there is no application fee to apply for the Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana.

faqs.question: What Documents Are Required To Apply For The Scholarship?
faqs.answer:
The following documents are required:
Aadhar Card
Passing Certificate of Class 12
Admission Certificate of the Post 10+2 Course
Copy of Bank Passbook
Copy of Fee Receipt
Copy of the Selection Letter Granted by the Educational Authority
Passport Size Photo
Domicile Certificate of Himachal Pradesh
Income Certificate
Fee Payment Receipt
Bonafide Certificate

faqs.question: Can A Candidate Apply For The Scholarship In Multiple Years?
faqs.answer: Yes, a candidate can apply for the scholarship in multiple years, provided she fulfills the eligibility criteria.

faqs.question: How Are The Candidates Selected For The Scholarship?
faqs.answer: The candidates are selected based on their academic performance, financial need, and overall merit.

faqs.question: How Are The Scholarship Amounts Disbursed To The Selected Candidates?
faqs.answer: The scholarship amounts are directly transferred to the bank account of the selected candidates.

faqs.question: Is There Any Penalty For Providing False Information In The Application?
faqs.answer: Yes, if a candidate is found to have provided false information in the application, her scholarship will be cancelled, and she may also face legal action.

faqs.question: Is There Any Age Limit To Apply For The Scholarship?
faqs.answer: No, there is no age limit to apply for the Kalpana Chawla Chatravriti Yojana.
